title: Policy
description: A governed bundle of Constraints plus combination logic that decides whether an action is permitted. Policy is where Constraints become enforceable governance: access control, data handling, approval workflows, safety rules. Because a Policy is composed of Constraints, the Constraint primitive is the deeper one; Policy adds authorship, scope, precedence, and enforcement.

combine.description: How member constraints combine: all | any | weighted

constraints.description: The Constraints this policy is composed of.

scope.description: What the policy applies to (identities, capabilities, resources).
